notes: PG-186 Document Settings delivered with audit-driven guards: (1) fake-green test grep returns 0 real occurrences, (2) both Cat-1 helpers have grep-verifiable production call sites — normalizeDocumentFilename at upload.router.ts:98 and assertNotDeleteGuarded at legal/documents.router.ts:587, (3) AutomationSection renders 'Pending IFC-310' / 'Pending IFC-311' badges with disabled switches for Cat-2 toggles, (4) all 3 AI toggles default false in Prisma schema. Plan-reviewer Finding 1 (MEDIUM) corrected inline — assertNotDeleteGuarded wired into legal/documents.router.ts delete mutation, query scope corrected to CaseDocument's own id. Test counts: 117/117 PG-186 tests pass (23 validator + 53 API + 41 web). Deferred: Prisma migration SQL generation (requires DB access), Lighthouse CI (requires production build), full monorepo typecheck/test (pre-existing failures in unrelated packages).
